title: Block structure mismatch in patch parts stream
description:
### Company or project name
Xdroid Voiceanalytics Project
### Describe what's wrong
The execution of the following query results in an error:
```
select
"id", "gdpr", "lock_time", "number_of_locks", "status", "status_message",
"operator_id", "operator_role_id", "location_id", "call_date", "language_id", "processed_engine_name", "getjob", "postjob", "file_name", "file_path"
from calls_queues where "status" <> 'ANALYZED' and "id" = 7391112686186261034 and "deleted_at" is null
limit 1
```
The error message:
```
Query 1 ERROR at Line 1: : DB::Exception: Block structure mismatch in patch parts stream: different names of columns:
number_of_locks UInt32 UInt32(size = 0)
lock_time Nullable(DateTime) Nullable(size = 0, UInt32(size = 0), UInt8(size = 0)): While executing MergeTreeSelect(pool: ReadPoolInOrder, algorithm: InOrder)
```
If I remove the number_of_locks field from the SELECT clause or the status condition from the WHERE clause, the query runs successfully.
The problem occurred when we ran updates in the system with the following settings:
```
<alter_update_mode>lightweight</alter_update_mode>
<lightweight_delete_mode>lightweight_update</lightweight_delete_mode>
```
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
Dockerized Clickhouse 25.9 latest and 25.10 latest
```
CREATE TABLE sandbox1.calls_queues
(
`id` UInt64 DEFAULT generateSnowflakeID(),
`call_date` DateTime,
`source_id` Nullable(String),
`file_name` String,
`display_name` Nullable(String),
`file_path` Nullable(String),
`file_date` Nullable(DateTime),
`mp3_dir_by_date` UInt8 DEFAULT '0',
`location_id` Nullable(UInt64),
`length` Nullable(UInt32),
`direction` Nullable(String),
`source_operator_id` Nullable(UInt64),
`operator_role_id` Nullable(UInt64),
`agent_classification_work_start` Nullable(UInt64),
`agent_classification_birthdate` Nullable(UInt64),
`anumber` Nullable(String),
`bnumber` Nullable(String),
`customer_id` Nullable(String),
`status` Nullable(String),
`status_message` Nullable(String),
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sandbox1.calls_queues_test (id BIGINT, call_date TIMESTAMP, status VARCHAR, number_of_locks INTEGER DEFAULT 0, lock_time TIMESTAMP, deleted_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO sandbox1.calls_queues_test (id, call_date, status, number_of_locks, lock_time, deleted_at) VALUES (7391112686186261034, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'PENDING', 5, NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO sandbox1.calls_queues_test (id, call_date, status, number_of_locks, lock_time, deleted_at) VALUES (7391112686186261035, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'ANALYZED', 0, NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, status, number_of_locks FROM sandbox1.calls_queues_test WHERE status <> 'ANALYZED' AND number_of_locks > 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, lock_time FROM sandbox1.calls_queues_test WHERE lock_time IS NULL OR number_of_locks = 0;
key_bug_features: Block structure mismatch in patch parts stream
